footer.description: The Fairy Craft creates premium handcrafted cane furniture for homes, cafés, resorts, and commercial spaces—made with enduring materials, skilled hands, and thoughtful detail.

contact.title: Let’s Create Something Timeless
contact.description: Explore our ready-made collections or speak with our team about a custom cane furniture piece for your home or business.
contact.ownDesignDescription: Send us the details below and we’ll provide a quotation and production timeline.
contact.quoteMessage: Hello, I would like to request a quote for handcrafted cane furniture.

hero.title: Handcrafted Cane Furniture for Timeless Living
hero.description: Discover handcrafted cane furniture designed for homes, cafés, resorts, and commercial spaces. From ready-made collections to fully custom designs, we bring your ideas to life.
hero.imageAlt: Handcrafted cane furniture in a warm, modern living space

hero.title: Your inspiration, made by skilled hands.
hero.description: Share a photo, Pinterest image, sketch, or reference and let our craftsmen create a cane furniture piece tailored to your space.
hero.imageAlt: A handcrafted cane chair in a naturally styled interior

reasons.description: We select natural cane responsibly for beauty, strength, and longevity.

reasons.title: Custom Furniture Available
reasons.description: Bring us your photo, Pinterest link, sketch, or idea for a made-to-order piece.

reasons.title: Durable Construction

reasons.title: Premium Finishing
reasons.description: Each surface and woven detail is carefully refined for a polished result.

reasons.title: Nationwide Delivery

home.testimonialsHeading: What our customers say about our craftsmanship.

testimonials.name: Nusrat Jahan
testimonials.review: The cane sofa set is beautifully made, sturdy, and even more refined in person. The craftsmanship shows in every woven detail.

testimonials.name: Fahim Ahmed
testimonials.review: We sent a reference image for a custom lounge chair. The team understood our idea and delivered a piece that fits our space perfectly.

testimonials.name: Sarah Rahman
testimonials.review: Excellent finish, clear communication, and furniture that feels built to last. Our dining set has transformed the room.

testimonials.name: Mehedi Hasan
testimonials.review: From consultation to delivery, the service was thoughtful. Our custom cane shelf arrived exactly as agreed.

home.faqHeading: Everything you need to know about custom and ready-made cane furniture.

faq.question: Can I order custom furniture?
faq.answer: Yes. We create made-to-order cane furniture based on your design, dimensions, material preferences, and finish.

faq.question: Can I send a Pinterest image?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Send a Pinterest link, photo, sketch, or inspiration image and our team will review what is possible.

faq.question: How long does production take?
faq.answer: Timelines vary by design and order size. We provide a clear production estimate after confirming the details of your piece.

faq.question: Do you deliver nationwide?
faq.answer: Yes. We arrange careful delivery for ready-made and custom furniture across Bangladesh.

faq.question: How do I maintain cane furniture?
faq.answer: Dust regularly with a soft brush or dry cloth, keep it away from prolonged moisture, and avoid direct harsh sunlight when possible.
